title: pittosporum illicioides var. oligocarpum
intro: Pittosporum illicioides var. oligocarpum is a variety of the Pittosporum genus, commonly known as the Chinese mock orange, a type of flowering evergreen shrub native to China. The medicinal properties of Pittosporum illicioides var. oligocarpum include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Pittosporum illicioides var. oligocarpum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
